name: People Drop Away Game
description: Block Puzzle, Slide Block, and any other hyper-casual game. Drag and drop the block diagonally and match blocks with people to drop into the hole. As you advance through the levels, youll encounter new types of blocks and obstacles that will test your problem-solving skills. Embrace the challenge and see how quickly you can clear the board! When youre stuck, use the hints!!
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
